name: dev-workflow
description: A trimmed, language-agnostic software-development lifecycle for constrained (Sonnet-4.5 / 200k) workflows — the portable, slimmed-down counterpart of the full superpowers plugin. Ships the chain brainstorming -> writing-plans -> executing-plans | subagent-driven-development (with tiered-subagent-dispatch + verifying-subagent-output) -> review gates (verification-before-completion, requesting-code-review, final-branch-review, iterative-review-before-commit) -> finishing-a-development-branch, plus using-git-worktrees. A SessionStart hook injects a thin bootstrap (instruction-priority order, scan-skills-before-responding, route-creative-work-to-brainstorming, the lifecycle map). Commands: /brainstorm, /plan, /execute, /finish. Pairs with the orchestrator plugin, which supplies the worker subagents the dispatch skills drive.
